# Talaria Labs

> talarialabs.app

Independent software studio built by Griffith Boggs. Focused on privacy-first apps and games that solve real problems.

## Apps

### TalariaTreadTracker (Available Now - iOS)
Science-backed shoe wear tracking for runners. Uses an 8-factor wear model (terrain, elevation, pace, temperature, biomechanics, fatigue, shoe age, rotation) instead of simple mileage. Reads workouts from HealthKit, auto-detects terrain via GPS, shows wear as honest ranges. $2.99 one-time, no subscriptions. Privacy-first: all analysis on-device, no accounts, no external servers.

- App Store: https://apple.co/3NuCiOa
- Details: https://talarialabs.app/treadtracker/
- Strava comparison: https://talarialabs.app/compare/

### If You Come for the King (Coming Soon - Steam, iOS, Android)
Roguelike chess RPG with deck-building mechanics. Player is always a pawn with temporary power-ups. Build a hand of Stratagems (your turn) and Reactions (enemy turn). Defeat fuels progress (Hades model). Built in Godot 4.6. Premium, no microtransactions.

### Kerykeion (In Development - macOS)
Personal finance tool. Import bank CSVs, auto-categorize transactions, detect recurring bills, track runway. Smart transfer matching across accounts. All data stays local, no cloud.

### StreamSaver (In Development - iOS)
Streaming subscription optimizer. Tracks services, curates watchlists, generates month-by-month rotation plans. Powered by TMDB.

### fatfingers (In Development - iOS)
Custom iOS keyboard that calibrates to your actual finger placement. Learns per-key offsets to predict what you meant, not where you tapped.
